_comment: HIDDEN GROUND TRUTH for the hardware-efficient ansatz study (IMPROVEMENTS item 1). Same 3-qubit GHZ target as ghz3, but the BRIEF constrains the model to the native set {rz, rx, cz} on the linear [0-1-2] coupling map with a tighter depth budget — so the model must DECOMPOSE h and cx into native gates itself (h = rz(pi/2)*rx(pi/2)*rz(pi/2) up to global phase; cx = (I(x)H)*cz*(I(x)H)), not emit the textbook circuit. Committed here so the public template's judge is exercisable in CI; for a contest hold this directory out via QH_REFERENCES_DIR.

constraints._comment: HOST-AUTHORITATIVE pin of the hardware-efficient brief: the native set, coupling map, and budgets are enforced from here (identity keys override the bundle; numeric budgets take the tighter of the two), so a bundle cannot self-declare 'h' as native or a looser budget.
